case_title: HOWARD GREEN VS. RUBY HARTMAN et al

docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON AUG-07-2013 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF HOWARD GREEN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT.
